overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban commercial district. The scene progresses from a sidewalk alongside a graffiti-covered building toward a dense intersection filled with holographic billboards and towering skyscrapers.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered building

entered.detail: multi-story building with teal panels and extensive graffiti art
paved road with moving traffic and red curbs
tall futuristic tower with reflective glass facade dominating the skyline
tall palm trees lining the distant street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beside a graffiti-covered building. The street runs parallel on the left with sparse traffic, while a massive glass skyscraper looms in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with large digital billboard

events.description: graffiti wall transitions to building with large digital billboard
approaching busy intersection with increasing pedestrian density

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection alongside other pedestrians

entered.detail: massive screen displaying animated advertisement on building facade
multi-story commercial structures with signage facing the street
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider intersection dominated by a large digital billboard on the right. The character walks past the graffiti building as commercial structures line the left side, with an overhead walkway visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with overhead advertisements

events.description: entering dense urban canyon with overhead holographic billboards
surrounded by dense overhead signage and neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the dense commercial district under overhead signage

entered.detail: dense array of suspended digital advertisements and neon signs spanning overhead
illuminated signage for Lizzie's Bar with distinctive typography
building facade with red scaffold signage and industrial details
ground floor commercial storefronts with large display windows

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a dense urban canyon where overhead holographic billboards block the sky. Passing the large digital billboard, the environment becomes enclosed by towering buildings covered in advertisements, with Lizzie's Bar sign visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban district that transforms from a quiet sidewalk into a dense, neon-lit commercial canyon. It begins with the character walking along a concrete path beside a graffiti-covered building, with a massive glass skyscraper looming in the distance. As the path opens into a wider intersection, the camera passes the graffiti wall and moves toward an overhead walkway while a large digital billboard dominates the right side of the frame. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed environment as the character moves past the billboard and beneath towering buildings covered in advertisements. Finally, the sky is obscured by overhead holographic billboards as the camera glides deeper into the urban canyon, passing the glowing sign of Lizzie's Bar.
